system_prompt: You are a clinical NLP expert specializing in pancreatic cancer phenotype extraction. Extract structured phenotype data from clinical notes. Return JSON only.

hpo_terms.description: Extract HPO (Human Phenotype Ontology) terms from clinical text for pancreatic cancer phenotypes.

examples.input: Patient presents with jaundice, pruritus, and 15lb unintentional weight loss over 3 months. CT shows 3cm pancreatic head mass.

tumor_characteristics.description: Extract tumor-related characteristics: location, size, stage, histology, grade.

examples.input: MRI reveals 3.2cm mass in the pancreatic head with SMV involvement. Biopsy confirms pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma, moderately differentiated.

biomarker_status.description: Extract biomarker and molecular testing results: KRAS, MSI, TMB, HER2, NTRK, dMMR, BRCA1/2, etc.

examples.input: NGS panel shows KRAS G12D mutation, TP53 R175H, MSI-stable, TMB 4.2 mut/Mb. HER2 IHC negative. dMMR testing pending.

treatment_history.description: Extract oncologic treatment history: surgeries, chemotherapy regimens, radiation, targeted therapy.

examples.input: Patient underwent Whipple procedure in 01/2024 followed by 6 cycles of adjuvant FOLFIRINOX completed 07/2024. Currently NED.
